What could be the possible causes of toothache?

Assistant
A toothache can be caused by several factors, including:

2. Gum disease
3. Tooth fracture or crack

6. Bruxism (teeth grinding)
7. Sinus issues (referred pain)
8. Teeth alignment problems
9. Trauma or injury to the mouth
10. Poor oral hygiene

These are some common causes of toothache.
